_instructions: Fill this after Apple portal setup. Validate with: node scripts/validate-apple-values.js --values apple-values.local.json
_do_not_commit: Rename to apple-values.local.json (gitignored). Values go into Codemagic UI, not the repo.

_where_each_goes.APP_STORE_APP_ID: Codemagic → App Settings → Environment Variables (not secure)
_where_each_goes.KEY_ID: Codemagic → Teams → Integrations → App Store Connect
_where_each_goes.ISSUER_ID: Codemagic → Teams → Integrations → App Store Connect
_where_each_goes.p8File: Codemagic → Teams → Integrations → App Store Connect (file upload)

_where_to_find_each.APP_STORE_APP_ID: App Store Connect → your app → General → Apple ID (numeric)
_where_to_find_each.KEY_ID: App Store Connect → Users and Access → Integrations → API → Key ID column (10 chars)
_where_to_find_each.ISSUER_ID: App Store Connect → Users and Access → Integrations → API → Issuer ID at top (UUID)
_where_to_find_each.p8File: Downloaded ONCE when API key was created — cannot re-download
